alerts.summary: Ongoing mpox outbreak in DRC with clade Ib variant spreading to neighbouring countries. WHO declared Public Health Emergency of International Concern in August 2024.
Marburg virus disease outbreak confirmed in Kagera region. Cases linked to fruit bat exposure. WHO coordinating response with national authorities.
Record dengue season in Brazil with over 4.2 million cases in 2024. Southeast and Central-West regions most affected. National health emergency declared.
Cholera surge in Sudan amid ongoing conflict. Displaced populations lack access to clean water. Multiple states affected including Khartoum and Gedaref.
Yellow fever cases reported across 12 states in Nigeria. Vaccination campaigns underway in high-risk areas. Aedes aegypti mosquito activity elevated due to rainfall.
